'''komafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacant|vacant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacant|vacant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| komafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:komafithi|komafithi]] || [[word:komafiji|komafiji]] || [[word:komafishi|komafishi]] || [[word:komafiki|komafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:komafuthuthu|komafuthuthu]] || [[word:komafujuju|komafujuju]] || [[word:komafushushu|komafushushu]] || [[word:komafukuku|komafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:komafuthu|komafuthu]] || [[word:komafuju|komafuju]] || [[word:komafushu|komafushu]] || [[word:komafuku|komafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:komafufthuf|komafufthuf]] || [[word:komafufjuf|komafufjuf]] || [[word:komafufshuf|komafufshuf]] || [[word:komafufkuf|komafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:komafethe|komafethe]] || [[word:komafeje|komafeje]] || [[word:komafeshe|komafeshe]] || [[word:komafeke|komafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:komafothotho|komafothotho]] || [[word:komafojojo|komafojojo]] || [[word:komafoshosho|komafoshosho]] || [[word:komafokoko|komafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:komafotho|komafotho]] || [[word:komafojo|komafojo]] || [[word:komafosho|komafosho]] || [[word:komafoko|komafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:komafofthof|komafofthof]] || [[word:komafofjof|komafofjof]] || [[word:komafofshof|komafofshof]] || [[word:komafofkof|komafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:komafÃŸfthÃŸf|komafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfjÃŸf|komafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfshÃŸf|komafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfkÃŸf|komafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:komafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|komafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|komafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|komafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|komafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:komafÃŸfthÃŸf|komafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfjÃŸf|komafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfshÃŸf|komafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfkÃŸf|komafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:komafÃŸfthÃŸf|komafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfjÃŸf|komafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfshÃŸf|komafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:komafÃŸfkÃŸf|komafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:komafÃḊthÃḊ|komafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:komafÃḊjÃḊ|komafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:komafÃḊshÃḊ|komafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:komafÃḊkÃḊ|komafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:komafathatha|komafathatha]] || [[word:komafajaja|komafajaja]] || [[word:komafashasha|komafashasha]] || [[word:komafakaka|komafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:komafatha|komafatha]] || [[word:komafaja|komafaja]] || [[word:komafasha|komafasha]] || [[word:komafaka|komafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:komafafthaf|komafafthaf]] || [[word:komafafjaf|komafafjaf]] || [[word:komafafshaf|komafafshaf]] || [[word:komafafkaf|komafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:komafasha|komafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:komafshÃḋasha|komafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:komafroasha|komafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:komafmuasha|komafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:komafyaasha|komafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokomafnkshÃḋasha|gokomafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokomafnkroasha|gokomafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokomafnkmuasha|gokomafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokomafnkyaasha|gokomafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:komamafasha|komamafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:komamafshÃḋasha|komamafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:komamafroasha|komamafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:komamafmuasha|komamafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:komamafyaasha|komamafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokomamafnkshÃḋasha|gokomamafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokomamafnkroasha|gokomamafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokomamafnkmuasha|gokomamafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokomamafnkyaasha|gokomamafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kemÃḊfasha|kemÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kemÃḊfshÃḋasha|kemÃḊfshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kemÃḊfroasha|kemÃḊfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kemÃḊfmuasha|kemÃḊfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kemÃḊfyaasha|kemÃḊfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokemÃḊfnkshÃḋasha|gokemÃḊfnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokemÃḊfnkroasha|gokemÃḊfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokemÃḊfnkmuasha|gokemÃḊfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokemÃḊfnkyaasha|gokemÃḊfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:komfafasha|komfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:komfafshÃḋasha|komfafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:komfafroasha|komfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:komfafmuasha|komfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:komfafyaasha|komfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokomfafnkshÃḋasha|gokomfafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokomfafnkroasha|gokomfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokomfafnkmuasha|gokomfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokomfafnkyaasha|gokomfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
